landing.title: Homework Helper 📚
landing.description: Your child asks the question, the tutor teaches how to solve it. No ready-made answers — because learning by doing is what matters.
landing.step1_desc: The child types their homework question
landing.step2_desc: Hints and questions to guide reasoning
landing.step3_desc: The child solves it and truly learns
landing.footer: No personal data collected · Free · Made for students

errors.rate_limit: Too many questions! Wait a moment 😊
errors.safe: I can't answer that. Send me a school question! 😊
errors.no_direct_answer: I can’t give the final answer directly, but I can help you get there step by step. Tell me what you tried and where you got stuck.
errors.ask_attempt_photo_math: If it’s math, you can send a photo of your work (steps and calculations) and I’ll help you find the mistake.
